openapi-schema-validator.description: Paste OpenAPI 3.x YAML or JSON and get instant validation errors and warnings. Checks required fields, paths, operations, response codes, and components. Runs entirely in your browser.

pnpm-workspace-generator.title: pnpm Workspace Generator
pnpm-workspace-generator.description: GUI to configure a pnpm monorepo workspace with package globs, catalog entries, overrides, and options. Generates a ready-to-use pnpm-workspace.yaml file.

wasm-module-explorer.title: WASM Module Explorer
wasm-module-explorer.description: Inspect WebAssembly modules by pasting WAT source or uploading a .wasm binary. View exports, imports, functions, memory, globals, and table declarations. Runs entirely in your browser.

css-container-query-builder.title: CSS Container Query Builder
css-container-query-builder.description: Visual builder for CSS @container rules. Configure container type, add breakpoints with conditions, and generate ready-to-copy CSS with live preview.

graphql-fragment-generator.title: GraphQL Fragment Generator
graphql-fragment-generator.description: Paste a GraphQL schema type definition and auto-generate reusable fragments. Supports nested types, interfaces, and unions with optional __typename and nested expansion.

k8s-resource-limits-calculator.title: K8s Resource Limits Calculator
k8s-resource-limits-calculator.description: Calculate Kubernetes CPU and memory requests/limits across containers and replicas. Generates container resource specs and namespace ResourceQuota YAML with 20% headroom.

http-status-code-reference.title: HTTP Status Code Reference
http-status-code-reference.description: Complete HTTP status code reference. Search all 1xx, 2xx, 3xx, 4xx, and 5xx codes with plain-English descriptions, real-world use cases, and when to use each in REST APIs.

cicd-pipeline-generator.title: CI/CD Pipeline Generator
cicd-pipeline-generator.description: Generate complete CI/CD pipeline YAML for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or CircleCI. Supports Node.js, Python, Docker, and Go projects with test, build, and deploy stages.

tsconfig-generator.title: TypeScript tsconfig.json Generator
tsconfig-generator.description: Build a complete tsconfig.json visually. Choose a preset (Strict, Next.js, React, Node, Deno), toggle compiler options with explanations, enable path aliases, and copy the ready-to-use config.

vitest-config-generator.title: Vitest Configuration Generator
vitest-config-generator.description: Generate a complete vitest.config.ts visually. Configure test environment (node/jsdom/happy-dom), coverage provider, reporters, thresholds, and path aliases.

package-json-generator.title: package.json Generator
package-json-generator.description: Generate a package.json file visually. Fill in name, version, license, scripts, and select common dependencies. Auto-separates dependencies and devDependencies.

git-hooks-generator.title: Git Hooks Generator (Husky + lint-staged)
git-hooks-generator.description: Generate Husky git hooks and lint-staged configuration visually. Configure pre-commit, pre-push, commit-msg hooks with ESLint, Prettier, and TypeScript checks.

prisma-schema-visualizer.title: Prisma Schema Visualizer
prisma-schema-visualizer.description: Paste your Prisma schema to instantly visualize it as an interactive ER diagram. Draggable model cards with color-coded field types and relation arrows.

llm-context-window-calculator.title: LLM Context Window Calculator
llm-context-window-calculator.description: Calculate token count and API cost for any LLM. Supports GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek. Shows context usage %, cost per call, and scale estimates.
